extraction_rule: Cell identity; role = placebo / CCB mono / ARB mono / combination.
CCB component (amlodipine, shared across trials) and its mg dose. 0 if absent. Shared, commensurable dose axis.
ARB component (valsartan / olmesartan / ...) and its mg dose. 0 if absent. Molecule-specific dose-response.
PER-ARM LS mean change from baseline in seated SBP at week 8 (the cell's own value, NOT a between-arm difference). Reductions are negative.
Per-arm SD or SE of the SBP change. *Either; with n, SE = SD/sqrt(n).
Per-arm LS mean change from baseline in seated DBP at week 8.
Per-arm SD or SE of the DBP change.
Mean baseline BP per arm; balance check.
Pre-filled with the outcome definition; append anything unusual.
